Travel Dialogues

When traveling in Greece, knowing how to ask for directions and handle common travel situations is essential.

Asking Where Something Is

Πού είναι η τουαλέτα; (Where is the bathroom?)
Πού είναι η στάση; (Where is the bus stop?)
Πού είναι η έξοδος; (Where is the exit?)

Asking How to Get Somewhere

Πώς πάω στην πλατεία; (How do I get to the square?)
Πώς πάω στην Ακρόπολη; (How do I get to the Acropolis?)

Direction Vocabulary

Ευθεία (Straight)
Αριστερά (Left)
Δεξιά (Right)
Εδώ / Εκεί (Here / There)

Travel Tip

In Greece, a nod of the head upward often means "No" (Όχι), while a nod downward means "Yes" (Ναι). This can be confusing for visitors at first!
